source_pr.title: *: support natural join.
source_pr.body:
TiDB doesn't support natural join now, and treat it as cross join.
This PR and #3372 are similar.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 natural left join t2 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 2 3", "10 20 <nil>")) (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 natural left join t2 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 2 3", "10 20 <nil>")) (executor/join_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR/patch looks like a correctness/refactor/feature change without a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization for the picked test. Keep as insufficient evidence until CI logs or a reliable repro is available.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 natural left join t2 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 2 3", "10 20 <nil>")) (executor/join_test.go)
files: ast/dml.go, executor/join_test.go, parser/misc.go, parser/parser.y, parser/parser_test.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go
